rationale: Educ. Code §30.024 governs employment terms for staff at the Texas School for the Blind and Visually Impaired. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 30.024. EMPLOYEES OF THE TEXAS SCHOOL FOR THE BLIND AND VISUALLY IMPAIRED.
_note: No conflict. The rule text addresses employment contracts and compensation for school employees, not property tax exemptions.
